abilities.shortEffect: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.
abilities.effect: When an opposing Pokémon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokémon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.

abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.
abilities.effect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.

abilities.shortEffect: Lowers incoming non-damaging moves' base accuracy to exactly 50%.
abilities.effect: Non-damaging moves have exactly 50% base accuracy against this Pokémon.
